name: part_010
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru' by Yuzuki Choco and Akai Haato.
MC section where Yuzuki Choco thanks her guests and announces her 2026 birthday goods.

subtitles.original: ...こぼれちゃったかな
subtitles.english: ...Has it spilled over?

subtitles.original: 自分のことは分からないまま
subtitles.english: Without even understanding myself,

subtitles.original: あの子にアドバイスまでしちゃって
subtitles.english: I even went and gave her advice.

subtitles.original: 胸が痛いや
subtitles.english: My chest hurts.

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The world is falling in love,

subtitles.original: 光の矢 胸を射す
subtitles.english: An arrow of light pierces my chest.

subtitles.original: 気づいたこの想いは
subtitles.english: These feelings I've realized,

subtitles.original: もう遅いの
subtitles.english: It's already too late.

subtitles.original: あの子の方が可愛いの
subtitles.english: She's cuter than me,

subtitles.original: 知ってるよ だけど
subtitles.english: I know that, but...

subtitles.original: 「うまくいかないで」なんて
subtitles.english: "I hope it doesn't work out,"

subtitles.original: 逃げ出したいクセに
subtitles.english: Even though I want to run away from such thoughts.

subtitles.original: ちょこ、君のこと全部知りたいって思っちゃう。
subtitles.english: Choco finds herself wanting to know everything about you.

subtitles.original: これが恋だって初めて気づいたの。
subtitles.english: I realized for the first time that this is love.

subtitles.original: 絶対振り向いてほしい。
subtitles.english: I definitely want you to look my way.

subtitles.original: 遅かったけど... 諦めたくない！
subtitles.english: I'm late, but... I don't want to give up!

subtitles.original: だって... 好きだから！
subtitles.english: Because... I love you!

subtitles.original: 春に咲いた花が恋をした
subtitles.english: The flowers that bloomed in spring fell in love.

subtitles.original: 花は必死に上を向いて笑った
subtitles.english: The flowers looked up and laughed with all their might.

subtitles.original: 青い夏の蕾も恋をした
subtitles.english: The buds of the blue summer also fell in love.

subtitles.original: 咲かない花と火薬の匂い
subtitles.english: A flower that doesn't bloom and the scent of gunpowder.

subtitles.original: 本当の気持ち言葉にして
subtitles.english: Putting my true feelings into words,

subtitles.original: 大事なこと話せたら
subtitles.english: If only I could talk about what's important.

subtitles.original: 今日もリスタート
subtitles.english: Today is another restart.

subtitles.original: どんなどんな君だから
subtitles.english: Because it's you, whatever kind of person you are,

subtitles.original: 口に出して言わなきゃ
subtitles.english: I have to say it out loud.

subtitles.original: 今君に伝えるよ
subtitles.english: I'll tell you right now.

subtitles.original: ねえ...
subtitles.english: Hey...

subtitles.original: 好きです
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The world is falling in love,

subtitles.original: 光の矢 胸を射す
subtitles.english: An arrow of light pierces my chest.

subtitles.original: 全部分かり合いたいよ
subtitles.english: I want us to understand everything about each other.

subtitles.original: ねえ 聞かせて
subtitles.english: Hey, let me hear it.

subtitles.original: たぐり寄せて もう0センチ
subtitles.english: Pulling you close, now there's zero centimeters between us.

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けた日々に
subtitles.english: In the days we ran through,

subtitles.original: 忘れない 忘れられない 輝く1ページ
subtitles.english: I won't forget, I can't forget, this shining page of my life.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで！
subtitles.english: All right! So!

subtitles.original: ここまではアキ様、ロボ子、ござるに、はあとと一緒に歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: Up until now, I sang along with Aki-sama, Roboco, Gozaru, and Haato!

subtitles.original: みんなありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone!

subtitles.original: さてさて、ここからはなんと重大告知が２つあります！
subtitles.english: Now then, from here on out, there are two major announcements!

subtitles.original: まず１つ目が...こちら！ドドン！
subtitles.english: First, the first one is... this! *Drumroll*

subtitles.original: 癒月ちょこ 誕生日記念 2026グッズ！
subtitles.english: Yuzuki Choco Birthday Celebration 2026 Goods!

subtitles.original: それではちょっと詳しくご紹介していきたいと思います。
subtitles.english: Now, I'd like to introduce them to you in more detail.

subtitles.original: まずはこちら！ちょこのクッション！
subtitles.english: First up is this! Choco's Cushion!

subtitles.original: いやこれね、いやちょっとちょこの誕生日といえば... 毎年Nardack先生ありがとうございますということで...
subtitles.english: You know, when it comes to Choco's birthday... I always have to thank Nardack-sensei, so...

subtitles.original: 今年もNardack先生にめちゃめちゃ素敵なイラスト描き下ろしていただきました！
subtitles.english: This year again, Nardack-sensei drew an incredibly wonderful illustration for me!

subtitles.original: 今回のテーマはバレンタインということで... ちょこめいとを抱きながら...
subtitles.english: This time the theme is Valentine's... so I'm hugging a Chocomate...

subtitles.original: ちょっと今回はチョコレート風のクッションにしてみました！
subtitles.english: This time, I decided to make it a chocolate-style cushion!

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute?

subtitles.original: サイズ感がちょうど枕くらいになってるので...
subtitles.english: The size is just about right for a pillow...

subtitles.original: ちょっとねお昼寝の時とか仮眠用に、つやーってできる感じで使えちゃいます。
subtitles.english: So you can use it to drift off into a nice sleep during a nap or a quick rest.

subtitles.original: そして続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: And next up is this!
